name: Conft
absorption_note: BLOCK A app (Conft) — TypeScript. Per ADR-023 app-policy: BLOCK A apps are self-repod. Conft is one of 6 BLOCK A apps (Apisync/DataKit/phenoData/Stashly/Conft/Tracely). Tracely already absorbed. Target: phenotype-apps/apps/conft/ as a sibling to the existing apps/ directory. Conft is the only non-Rust BLOCK A app.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; BLOCK A app fits the apps monorepo policy.
